name: keepseek-webview-ux-maintainer
description: KeepSeek webview UI, input, shortcuts, transcript, settings, and interaction maintenance workflows.

interface.longDescription: Use this plugin for KeepSeek webview work across transcript rendering, settings UI, prompt input, rich-text shortcuts, drag and drop, command menus, styling, accessibility, and message wiring.
defaultPrompt: Use $keepseek-webview-ux-maintainer to improve this webview flow.
Use $keepseek-webview-ux-maintainer to review a prompt input change.
